blueprint.name: Auto Lights
blueprint.description: Control lights with one blueprint: sensor-based on/off, adaptive lighting, or both. The interface is organized around operating modes so optional settings stay out of the way until needed.
input.auto_mode_behavior.description: Additional behavior for the control entity above. Restore and disable actions require that entity to be an input_boolean.
input.auto_mode_behavior.name: Adaptive control behavior
input.auto_mode_behavior.option.restore_: Restore when all lights are off
input.auto_mode_boolean.description: Optional input_boolean or binary_sensor that enables adaptive updates. Leave empty to always allow adaptation in adaptive modes.
input.auto_mode_boolean.name: Adaptive control entity
input.brightness_day.description: Maximum brightness around the middle of the day.
input.brightness_day.name: Maximum brightness
input.brightness_night.description: Minimum brightness around sunrise and sunset.
input.brightness_night.name: Minimum brightness
input.control_entities_off.description: Input booleans that must stay off for automatic on/off to run. Leave empty to not require any switch to be off.
input.control_entities_off.name: Control switches that must be off
input.control_entities_on.description: Input booleans that must stay on for automatic on/off to run. Leave empty to not require any switch to be on.
input.control_entities_on.name: Control switches that must be on
input.keep_on_open_doors.description: When enabled, open door/window sensors keep the lights on. When disabled, only motion, occupancy, and presence sensors keep lights on.
input.keep_on_open_doors.name: Keep lights on with open doors
input.kelvin_day.description: Coolest white temperature around the middle of the day.
input.kelvin_day.name: Maximum temperature
input.kelvin_night.description: Warmest white temperature around sunrise and sunset.
input.kelvin_night.name: Minimum temperature
input.light_sensors.description: Illuminance sensors used by the low-lux turn-on rules. If multiple sensors are selected, the average value is used.
input.light_sensors.name: Illuminance sensors
input.light_threshold.description: Lights turn on only when the average illuminance is below this value. Ignored unless the turn-on rule uses illuminance.
input.light_threshold.name: Illuminance threshold
input.lights.name: Lights
input.night_mode_brightness.description: Fixed brightness applied while night mode is active.
input.night_mode_brightness.name: Night brightness
input.night_mode_entity.description: Optional input_boolean or binary_sensor that applies the fixed night values below while active.
input.night_mode_entity.name: Night mode entity
input.night_mode_kelvin.description: Fixed white temperature applied while night mode is active.
input.night_mode_kelvin.name: Night temperature
input.off_delay.description: Time to wait before turning lights off after the sensors become inactive.
input.off_delay.name: Turn off delay
input.operating_mode.description: Choose whether this automation manages automatic on/off, adaptive lighting, or both.
input.operating_mode.name: Operating mode
input.sensors.description: Binary sensors that drive automatic on/off. Leave empty when using adaptive-only mode.
input.sensors.name: Sensors
input.switch_entity.description: Optional input_boolean used as an external toggle. Turning it on immediately turns the managed lights on, and turning it off immediately turns them off. This toggle bypasses the turn-on rule and control switches.
input.switch_entity.name: Switch entity
input.turn_on_rule.description: Choose when sensor-based turn-on is allowed. Low-lux rules use the illuminance sensors below. The optional switch entity always toggles the lights immediately.
input.turn_on_rule.name: Turn-on rule
input.weather_entity.description: Optional weather entity used to slightly shift adaptive brightness and white temperature.
input.weather_entity.name: Weather entity
section.adaptive.curve.description: Daytime adaptive curve for brightness and white temperature.
section.adaptive.options.description: External control, weather adjustment, and optional night mode behavior.
section.auto_onoff.options.description: Turn-on rules, optional switch binding, and control entities.
